series_metadata.series_description: This log lists all agencies receiving direct transfer of property. Listed here are nomenclature, goverment holding agency, government acquisition costs, Ohio State Number (OSN), and transfer price plus date of transfer and invoice. This log is used for transferring property from the holding agency directly to the donee without ever being here at the surplus warehouse.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in operating system for three years after the Federal review, then destroy., Electronic: Erase
